# CANDIDATE: ORB_RETEST_LONG_OR_RANGE_GATE

**Filed:** 2026-05-25
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** quality_gate
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis
The ORB_RETEST_LONG setup has an in-sample win rate of 54.1% (N=111). Analysis of raw watcher-observations.jsonl shows losing trades have larger opening ranges (median or_range=2.67) versus winners (median or_range=1.64). A filter of or_range < 2.00 is expected to improve IS win rate to 76.2% by excluding volatile, low-quality breakouts while preserving profitable setups.

## Mechanism
Entry: ORB_RETEST_LONG signal (break above ORH, pullback within $0.20 of ORH from above, close above ORH on green bar) AND or_range < 2.00 (opening range in dollars, ORH - ORL).  
Exit: Chart stop at ORH (SPY close < ORH - $0.05), premium stop = -0.99 (chart-stop-only), TP1 = ORH + 50% × or_range, runner = ORH + 100% × or_range, profit-lock chandelier v15, time stop 15:50 ET.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline  
2. **Sample bias:** Sample size N=285 raw observations (IS N=111, OOS N=174) from watcher-observations.jsonl (16-month period). Selection method: all ORB_RETEST_LONG signals generated by watcher. Overfit risk: moderate; single-feature threshold derived from median split of IS winners/losers. Mitigated by strong OOS performance.  
3. **Out-of-sample:** OOS N=91 WR=95.6% exp=+$27.18 (raw obs, or_range<2.0 filter) -- PASS  
4. **Real-fills:** N=22 OPRA cases, WR=81.8% (J-anchor + independent samples) -- PASS  
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: false breakout with or_range just below 2.00; Max drawdown: unknown without full backtest; Blow-up scenario: regime shift to persistently high or_range (>2.00) causing signal starvation (mitigated by strategy diversity).  
6. **Concentration:** Top-5 days = 16% of P&L (deduped, per ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE analysis)  

## Pre-merge gate
Gym validators 67/67 PASS, walk-forward OOS/IS Sharpe ratio >=0.50, real-fills N>=10 WR>=60%

## Confidence
8 / 10 -- based on IS/WF/OOS consistency and real-fills validation from ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE (#4)

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact
Complements ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE (#4) and ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER (#5) by proposing the specific or_range<2.00 quality gate for ORB_RETEST_LONG watcher. No conflict; refines existing signal accumulation. Aligns with deployed ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE gate logic.
